_schema_notes.description: Community-contributed notes for the Bitcoin Miner Hosting ROI Comparison tool.
_schema_notes.how_to_contribute: See CONTRIBUTING.md for full instructions. Fork the repo, add your entry below following the schema, submit a Pull Request.

fields.host: Exact name of the hosting company as it appears in the tool
fields.date: Date of your experience or observation (YYYY-MM-DD)
fields.type: One of: rate_update | customer_experience | pool_policy | brand_policy | warning | correction
fields.note: Your factual observation. Be specific — include dates, dollar amounts, what happened.
fields.verified: Leave as false — blackshirt-crypto sets this to true after review
fields.source: Optional — URL or reference supporting your note

notes.note: Confirmed $0.0825/kWh rate is still current as of May 2026. Setup took 3 days from miner arrival to hashing. Support responded within 2 hours by phone.
